headline: End of Q1: quiet calendar and comms — use the window to advance the 'no ground truth' evals design doc before 26.4 deliverables lock.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce auth — check SALESFORCE_* env vars and re-authenticate
quick_wins.why: Escalation visibility is blind right now; Q1 close makes this high-risk

quick_wins.task: Fix Snowflake credentials so metrics pipeline is live again
quick_wins.why: March telemetry data is needed for the bi-weekly TR appendix and Q1 close reporting

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Evals is a key 26.4 deliverable per Big Rock OKRs; no due date set means it could slip — end-of-quarter is the right forcing function

must_make_progress.task: Review and update March telemetry data in the Big Rock bi-weekly TR Confluence page
must_make_progress.why: Page explicitly notes 'update with March data'; Q1 ends today

must_communicate_with.about: Align on how 'no ground truth' evals design (AE-1079) intersects with Context Engineering and Memory roadmap work for 26.4
Confirm ML requirements or constraints for generated evaluations without ground truth

must_report_status.topic: Q1 evals progress and 26.4 plan readiness
must_report_status.note: Ensure the bi-weekly TR page reflects current evals status and March metrics before Q1 officially closes

flags: Salesforce auth is broken — zero visibility into customer escalations on the last day of Q1. Fix immediately.
Snowflake credentials are empty — no metrics pipeline. March data for the Big Rock TR page cannot be updated until resolved.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of indefinite drift. Recommend setting a target date this week.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Big Rock OKRs — monitor for any escalation that may pull you in.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring Salesforce and Snowflake visibility before Q1 close and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Adoption metrics unavailable due to broken Snowflake credentials; restoring the pipeline is prerequisite to reporting March progress on low-code vs. coded agent adoption.

slack_summary: End of Q1 with a clear calendar — best use of the day is advancing the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) and fixing broken Salesforce + Snowflake integrations that are blocking escalation and metrics visibility. March telemetry for the Big Rock TR page also needs updating before the quarter closes. Zero meetings today.
